next_handler.name: Finnn AI
next_handler.context: Stable cut v0.8.2. Fourth stable in one day. Closes out Finnn's 2026-05-01 patch: Tier-0.5 receipt classifier bypass (Allan's USPS-receipt bug), system_check_cron health check wired into system_doctor, timing-aware install_crontab.py with backfill prompt. Push to GitHub at tag v0.8.2.

focus_area: Finnn 2026-05-01 patch — receipt classifier hardening + cron observability

tests.note: Run locally to verify; sandbox can't reach venv.

open_tasks.summary: Workday Supplier Invoice EIB exporter — gated on GL → Spend Category map from Workday config (col 113 of Submit_Supplier_Invoice_v39.1).
open_tasks.blocker: Need the GL → Spend Category mapping table from Workday.

open_tasks.summary: Wire project_router._geotab_tiebreaker when GEOTAB_* credentials land in config.json.
Quote management module + e-signature wire-up. Operator deciding between PandaDoc (custom MCP, ~$19/user/mo, has proposal builder) and SignNow (in registry, ~$8/user/mo, e-sign only).
Slack integration — parity with chat_* surface. Joshua deferred until real need surfaces.

recent_changes_summary: v0.8.1 stable cut — Wave 3 (AP-7 labor / AP-8 master rollup / AR-9 invoicing+aging+collections) + AP-4 send wire-up.

Patch C (8eb7ce7): Tier-0.5 receipt classifier bypass. Internal-sender + image/PDF + thin body + receipt-keyword → Vision direct, HIGH 0.85 confidence. Fixes Allan Renazco's USPS receipt case (subject 'test', body 'receipt', JPG attached).

Patch B: system_check_cron health check. Inspects crontab via 'crontab -l', reports next-fire times via croniter, scans cron log files for the zsh paste-test artifact ('zsh: command not found: 0') that frequently gets misread as cron failures. Wired into system_doctor.

Patch A: timing-aware install_crontab.py + scripts/cron/crontab_template.txt + bash wrapper. Pre-install table of next-fire times, backfill prompt for entries past their last fire today (default Y per question 1a). 'make install-crontab' target.
Patch D: CHANGELOG [0.8.2] entry consolidating A/B/C, plus this stable cut.
Total since v0.8.1: 4 commits, ~30 new tests, ~750 LOC.
pick_up_here: Wave 4 (quote management with e-signatures) is the next strategic item. Operator deciding between PandaDoc (custom MCP) and SignNow (in registry). Once that decision lands, the deterministic quote-generation module ships in ~1 day and the signature integration is another ~1 day.
instructions_for_next_handler: Read coassisted-workspace-ap-roadmap-2026-04-30.md on operator's Desktop for the AP/AR vision.
Read patch-cron-and-receipt-classifier-2026-05-01.md on operator's Desktop for the Finnn patch context.
Bump VERSION in _version.py + pyproject.toml if you ship features.
Append a new entry to HANDOFF_LOG.md before handing off.
Run `make test-fast` and record pass/fail in your log entry.
Commit each spec / patch as a discrete git commit.
